Dashboard Archive: 2026-04-10 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
Today's momentum ranker shows two exceptional performers with dramatically different risk profiles. LITE leads at rank #1 with a clean 94.0 composite score, demonstrating balanced strength across all metrics—it's up 1,693.88% over one year while maintaining consistent ratio growth (all 5 ratio passes) and showing resilience on down SPY days (0.0084 bad_spy_score). AXTI ranks second with an even more extreme 4,762.12% one-year return but shows more volatile momentum ratios (only 4 passes) and a slight negative correlation to SPY moves (-0.0007 bad_spy_score), suggesting its gains are less tied to broad market weakness. Both stocks clear all SMA gates (trading above their 30, 50, 100, and 200-day moving averages) and outpace both SPY and QQQ significantly, but LITE's more consistent ratio progression and better bad-day resilience distinguish it as the higher-quality momentum signal according to this dashboard's methodology.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

Click column headers to sort  |  Score = percentile composite: returns + ratio passes + bad-SPY resilience  |  SMA ✓ = price above all SMAs (30/50/100/200)  |  Ratio = short-term momentum consistency (out of 5 tests)  |  M = momentum signal (sortable) —  ● clean  ● stalling  ● overextended  |  V = volume confirmation (sortable) —  ● confirmed  ● normal  ○ thin  |  PB = entry timing: down day on strong stock (sortable by 1d return) —  ● buy today  ○ none  |  OL = theme overlap vs owned tickers —  ● overlap  ○ clear
